description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-skeleton: loading placeholder for BigPipe content streaming in Drupal. Text, circular, rectangular variants with pulse animation.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-skeleton/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Text, circular, and rectangular variants
- [ ] Configurable width, height, border-radius
- [ ] Pulse animation (CSS-only, no JS)
- [ ] Wave animation variant
- [ ] CSS parts: skeleton
- [ ] ARIA: aria-busy=true, aria-label
- [ ] <5KB gzipped

**Complexity:** small
title: Implement hx-skeleton component
